Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Daruman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Daruman uses a Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Daruman has authority over chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Daruman's armor is carved from the bones of Oth’kimeth’s physical body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Daruman is known as the King of Madness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Daruman wears a bone helmet and yellowed armor with a fur cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Daruman wields Ozriel’s Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Daruman was once the hero who became the Mad King.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Daruman was once the greatest of the Abidan Executors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Daruman has red-sun eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Daruman was capable of tearing holes to the Void long ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Daruman had broken out of the depths of Haven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Daruman spoke as they drifted toward the central planet of Limit.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman told Gerravon that Ozriel was weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel's actions were intended to narrow down Daruman’s choices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Daruman has servitors inhabiting his chambers.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Daruman wears armor of yellowed bone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Daruman is a character who responded to Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman put a lockdown on the Sector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman is expected to emerge from Vesper victorious in his battle with Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Daruman is a combatant who destroyed Ozriel's Mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Daruman weathered the attack from the Mad King using gold circles anchored by a fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Daruman may have come to Cradle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
